textByHash.0aaf6988382ed752035d403e8ec4df841cf1af7e: Fool, you'll regret this one day.
textByHash.20c0f5f3a692a0991a68ecac75b6f2d29af140d0: The glorious battlefield of Castle Wars, where we can smite down the weak followers of Saradomin needs new blood.
textByHash.386ae8d5657a9476437a2fe98e5cfdae1b37faa6: Saradomin is weak, use your strength where it's respected!
textByHash.4499fdb9e79f8e2467996ad561e77fb80ad62a18: Our all-powerful Lord Zamorak is looking for the strongest of champions, you hardly look like you fit that criteria.
textByHash.4baddf196d197ce58f0a33a0a36127c0b04bcad9: Your Lord Zamorak needs your help!
textByHash.812ae4725d77b987574517dbc0eacbf81216126f: Bring death to Saradomin in his great name.
